dialogue.speaker: wren
dialogue.line: Hold still -- two taps, a breath. There. You're free.

dialogue.speaker: tam
dialogue.line: He says the wreck's hatch is round the gantry. We lost a minute, but we made a friend. Worth it.

_note: R3b-2 BR-SLICE option 'help' target. Sets SLICE_HELPED_DOCKHAND (via the branch option). Converges on SLICE-WRECK.
